testCases: TC1: basic 10x12 room, 1 door, 2 windows, 2 coats flat → output { total: 2, breakdown: { wallArea:352, doorsArea:21, windowsArea:30, netArea:301, coats:2, coveragePerGallon:350, gallonsRaw:1.72, gallonsNeeded:2 } }

TC2: large 20x15 room, 9ft ceiling, 2 doors, 3 windows, 3 coats satin → output { total: 5, breakdown: { wallArea:630, doorsArea:42, windowsArea:45, netArea:543, coats:3, coveragePerGallon:350, gallonsRaw:4.65, gallonsNeeded:5 } }

TC3: small 8x8 room, 8ft ceiling, 0 doors, 1 window, 1 coat high_gloss → output { total: 1, breakdown: { wallArea:256, doorsArea:0, windowsArea:15, netArea:241, coats:1, coveragePerGallon:300, gallonsRaw:0.8, gallonsNeeded:1 } }
TC4: no doors/windows 10x10, 1 coat flat → output { total: 1, breakdown: { wallArea:320, doorsArea:0, windowsArea:0, netArea:320, coats:1, coveragePerGallon:350, gallonsRaw:0.91, gallonsNeeded:1 } }
TC5: negative roomWidth → output { error: "Room width must be greater than 0" }
TC6: roomWidth NaN or string "abc" → output { error: "Room width must be a number" }
TC7: missing required fields → output { error: "Room width must be a number" } (catch first missing)
TC8: invalid paintType "latex" → output { error: "Invalid paint type" }
TC9: invalid coats "five" → output { error: "Invalid number of coats" }
TC10: ceilingHeight zero → output { error: "Ceiling height must be greater than 0" }
TC11: doors negative → output { error: "Doors must be a non‑negative integer" }

TC12: many doors/windows causing negative net area → output { total: 0, breakdown: { wallArea:320, doorsArea:630, windowsArea:600, netArea:0, coats:1, coveragePerGallon:350, gallonsRaw:0, gallonsNeeded:0 } } (10x10 room, 30 doors, 40 windows)

TC13: paintType "Satin" (capital S) → treated as satin → output like TC2 with different dims (10x10, 8ft, 0 doors, 0 windows, 1 coat) → { total: 1, breakdown: { wallArea:320, doorsArea:0, windowsArea:0, netArea:320, coats:1, coveragePerGallon:350, gallonsRaw:0.91, gallonsNeeded:1 } }

TC14: coats "Two" (capital T) → normalizes to "two" → 2 coats → output as if 2 coats on 10x10 flat → { total: 2, breakdown: { wallArea:320, doorsArea:0, windowsArea:0, netArea:320, coats:2, coveragePerGallon:350, gallonsRaw:1.83, gallonsNeeded:2 } }

TC15: roomWidth string "12" → converted to number 12 → output valid calculation (12x10, 8ft, 0 doors, 0 windows, 1 coat flat) → { total: 1, breakdown: { wallArea:352, doorsArea:0, windowsArea:0, netArea:352, coats:1, coveragePerGallon:350, gallonsRaw:1.01, gallonsNeeded:2 } } (352/350=1.0057 ceil 2) actually 352*1/350=1.0057 ceil=2. So total:2.

TC16: extremely large room 100x100, 20ft ceiling, 0 doors/windows, 1 coat flat → output { total: 23, breakdown: { wallArea:8000, doorsArea:0, windowsArea:0, netArea:8000, coats:1, coveragePerGallon:350, gallonsRaw:22.86, gallonsNeeded:23 } }

TC17: 10x10, 30 doors, 40 windows, netArea 0 → output { total: 0, breakdown: { wallArea:320, doorsArea:630, windowsArea:600, netArea:0, coats:1, coveragePerGallon:350, gallonsRaw:0, gallonsNeeded:0 } }
TC18: roomWidth 0 → output { error: "Room width must be greater than 0" }
TC19: roomLength 0 → output { error: "Room length must be greater than 0" }

TC20: omit ceilingHeight (default 8) → output with default: 10x12, 1 door, 2 windows, 2 coats eggshell → output { total: 3, breakdown: { wallArea:352, doorsArea:21, windowsArea:30, netArea:301, coats:2, coveragePerGallon:300, gallonsRaw:2.01, gallonsNeeded:3 } }
TC21: valid high_gloss paint type → output as TC3
